pattern_name: same device reused across multiple suspicious orders
hypothesis_1: Regional or operational weaknesses create a repeatable fraud opportunity.
hypothesis_2: Certain user/device cohorts are exploiting known control gaps.
hypothesis_3: Model thresholds may not yet block this suspicious segment early enough.
validation_needed: Drill into the segment over 2–4 weeks and compare treated vs untreated cohorts.
evidence_used: weekly diagnosis, named patterns, segment deep dive tables
